ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the patient */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the patient */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "sex" INTEGER /* Sex of the patient (1: male, 2: female) */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the patient in cm */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the patient in kg */,
  "smoke" INTEGER /* Smoking status of the patient (0: non-smoker, 1: smoker) */,
  "alco" INTEGER /* Alcohol consumption status of the patient (0: non-drinker, 1: drinker) */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Physical activity level of the patient (0: inactive, 1: active) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the patient */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the patient */,
  "insurance_provider" TEXT /* Insurance provider of the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medical_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medical history record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Medical condition (e.g., hypertension, diabetes) */,
  "diagnosis_date" TEXT /* Date of diagnosis */,
  "treatment" TEXT /* Treatment plan for the condition */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medical_history_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diagnostic_tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each diagnostic test */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "test_name" TEXT /* Name of the diagnostic test (e.g., blood pressure, lipid profile) */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the diagnostic test */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date the test was performed */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of test (e.g., lab, imaging) */,
  "units" TEXT /* Units of measurement for the test result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diagnostic_tests_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "appointments" (
  "appointment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each appointment */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "appointment_date" TEXT /* Date of the appointment */,
  "appointment_time" TEXT /* Time of the appointment */,
  "appointment_type" TEXT /* Type of appointment (e.g., follow-up, new patient) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the appointment (e.g., scheduled, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("appointment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medications" (
  "medication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medication */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "medication_name" TEXT /* Name of the medication */,
  "dosage" TEXT /* Dosage instructions */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of medication (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of medication */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of medication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("medication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medications_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role (e.g., doctor, nurse, researcher) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cardiovascular_disease_risk_factors" (
  "risk_factor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk factor */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "ap_hi" INTEGER /* Systolic blood pressure (AP_hi) */,
  "ap_lo" INTEGER /* Diastolic blood pressure (AP_lo) */,
  "cholesterol" INTEGER /* Cholesterol level */,
  "gluc" INTEGER /* Glucose level */,
  "bmi" REAL /* Body Mass Index (BMI) */,
  "waist_circumference" INTEGER /* Waist circumference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("risk_factor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cardiovascular_disease_risk_factors_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research study */,
  "study_name" TEXT /* Name of the research study */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the research study */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the research study */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the research study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient engagement record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "engagement_date" TEXT /* Date of engagement */,
  "engagement_type" TEXT /* Type of engagement (e.g., appointment, phone call) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the engagement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_engagement_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wearable_device_data" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wearable device */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "data_date" TEXT /* Date of data collection */,
  "heart_rate" INTEGER /* Heart rate */,
  "blood_pressure" INTEGER /* Blood pressure */,
  "physical_activity" INTEGER /* Physical activity level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wearable_device_data_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "electronic_health_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each electronic health record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "record_date" TEXT /* Date of record creation */,
  "clinician_notes" TEXT /* Clinician notes */,
  "test_results" TEXT /* Test results */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_electronic_health_records_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)
